chrome.tagline: tar·a·did·dle /ˈtærəˌdɪdl/ n. — a petty lie; pretentious nonsense.
chrome.footerLine1: Taradiddle.news is a fully automated satirical publication. Every article is fiction generated by a language model.
chrome.footerLine2: Any resemblance to real events is a hallucination.

article.disclosure: This article was generated by a large language model. It is satire. None of it happened.
article.notTranslated: This article hasn't been translated yet. Showing the English original while our translation model finishes its coffee.

listing.searchNone: No articles matched. Our algorithm suggests searching for something it already wrote.
listing.emptyCategory: Nothing in this section yet. The model is presumably thinking.

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.sub: Which, for a publication that makes everything up, is unusually honest of us.
